typecheck.details: TypeScript typecheck passed across all packages

build.details: Build completed successfully for all packages

summary: Scrutiny validation for M1-cli-build milestone completed successfully. All validators passed (test, typecheck, build). The cli-liveness-command feature was reviewed and passed all validation contract assertions (VAL-CLI-001 through VAL-CLI-014 and VAL-CROSS-001). The implementation correctly combines three truth surfaces (packet truth, chain truth, active run) into one operator-facing view with distinct sections and proper state classification. No blocking issues were found.
